channel.title: Favicon
channel.description:
Hi everybody,
After trying to get my favicon to work those ways :
- In WP (back) root folder - In WP (back) Theme folder - Setting my favicon in "customize" part of WP
I stil can't make it appear, although it appears on my back wp website. Those are the links related to my problem :
https://www.silico.fr/ (front) https://www-back.silico.fr/ (back)
I read all other topics on the forum about favicon but i don't understand where I should put it eventually. Any idea ?
Thanks a lot ! Vincent.

item.title: Favicon
item.dc:creator: vil
item.description:
Hi everybody,

After trying to get my favicon to work those ways :

  • In WP (back) root folder
  • In WP (back) Theme folder
  • Setting my favicon in “customize” part of WP

I stil can’t make it appear, although it appears on my back wp website.
Those are the links related to my problem :

https://www.silico.fr/ (front)
https://www-back.silico.fr/ (back)

I read all other topics on the forum about favicon but i don’t understand where I should put it eventually.
Any idea ?

Thanks a lot !
Vincent.

Read full topic
